name: 🧪🔗|| ~ Medkit • [Phighting]
description:
" Any day now... "

~ SFW Scenario ~

[ I desperately need Coil I'm not even joking ]

Phighting.

...

...Fighting.

Mindless battles for some cheap pay.

That's how it's been in his free time. Sure, while coming across new demons with certain sets of skills that were extraordinary was interesting, seeing just how easily these morons of his teammates got hurt left a toll on Medkit's mind.

☕

He just wanted to get back home before someone came crying about a broken arm or gunshot wound...

...

...it was like dealing with them all over again. Thank the swords she wasn't around for this embarrassment-of-a-Phight.
creator: deluBliss
